chapter_title.en: Chapter on Days and Times Recommended for Travel and Days and Times Disliked for Travel

text: 2398 - وَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : « اَلسَّبْتُ لَنَا وَ اَلْأَحَدُ لِبَنِي أُمَيَّةَ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.2398 - Imam (as) said: "Saturday is for us, and Sunday is for Banu Umayyah."
